response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack experience, deep systems thinking, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of staff-level technical strategy in AI-native environments, has minimal Python exposure (a must-have), and no demonstrated ownership of high-throughput distributed systems at scale with on-call responsibility — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Extensive distributed systems and low-latency backend work (e.g., DLang, microservices at Dunnhumby)
Strong operational and open-source leadership (GISCollective, CI/CD setup, workshops)
concerns: No demonstrated Python expertise — critical for the role
Lack of clear evidence leading technical strategy at staff level in AI-driven code production environments
No mention of on-call ownership or incident response in high-reliability systems

key_factors.factor: Ownership of distributed systems at scale
